name: vrbo-skills
description: Agent skills for Vrbo data (search, availability, prices, cross-OTA comparison, reviews) via StayingAPI.
author: StayingAPI

skills.name: vrbo-search
skills.description: Search live Vrbo stays by location, dates and occupancy, returned in one unified schema alongside every other booking platform. Use when a user wants to find Vrbo listings. Powered by the StayingAPI REST API / MCP server.

skills.name: vrbo-availability
skills.description: Check day-by-day Vrbo availability (the booking calendar) for a known listing over a date window. Use when a user asks whether a listing on Vrbo is open on specific dates. Powered by StayingAPI.

skills.name: vrbo-reviews
skills.description: Read normalized Vrbo reviews for a listing, with native rating scales preserved. Use when a user wants ratings or guest feedback for a listing on Vrbo. Powered by StayingAPI.

skills.name: vrbo-prices
skills.description: Get a real Vrbo price quote for a listing and dates, and compare that property across booking platforms for the cheapest rate. Use for "how much is this Vrbo place" or "is it cheaper elsewhere". Powered by StayingAPI.

skills.name: vrbo-full
skills.description: Complete Vrbo toolkit — search, availability, listing detail, price, cross-OTA price comparison and reviews, all in one unified schema. Install this when an agent needs broad Vrbo coverage. Powered by StayingAPI.

skills.name: vrbo-rentals
skills.description: Search Vrbo vacation rentals by location, dates and occupancy in one unified schema. Use for vacation-rental discovery on Vrbo. Powered by StayingAPI.
